working_on: Fix Issue #8: routine sessions cannot see SUPABASE_DB_URL because (a) .env is gitignored and not propagated to worktrees, and (b) no engine tool calls load_dotenv. Land Option A walk-up loader (engine/tools/load_env.py) wired into check_target.py and validate.py main().
declared_scope: Land engine/tools/load_env.py with walk-up dotenv loader (find_dotenv + load_dotenv + load_dotenv_walk_up); write engine/tools/test_load_env.py with ~10 tests covering walk-up traversal, override semantics, and idempotency; wire load_dotenv_walk_up() into engine/tools/check_target.py main() and engine/tools/validate.py main(); reuse parse_env() from setup_env.py; verify end-to-end by running check_target.py from this worktree (which has no local .env) and confirming migration_applied advances past 'SUPABASE_DB_URL not set' to a live DB query; close Issue #8; append Resolved line to the would-be-S-0049 HANDOFF entry. End state: backlog 3 open -> 2 (#8 closed; #1, #2 remain upstream).
